FOOTER.TAGLINE: Architecting resilient software ecosystems with precision and passion.

SUBTITLE.NAME: I'm Eimar Romero
SUBTITLE.FOCUS: Focused on building scalable ecosystems with

ANGULAR.DESC: Load time optimization via Lazy Loading & Signals.

NESTJS.DESC: API response time reduction through modular DTOs.

POSTGRES.DESC: Query performance boost via strategic indexing.

FREELANCE.DESC: Collaborating with diverse clients to architect and deliver scalable web solutions. Focusing on fullstack ecosystems using NestJS and Angular with Dockerized deployments.

SENIOR.DESC: Led the architectural design and development of mission-critical enterprise applications. Championed component-driven design and strict adherence to Clean Code principles.

ENGINEER.DESC: Delivered an internal communication platform combining frontend leadership with robust backend ownership. Engineered real-time data flows and resilient APIs.

PROJECTS.DESC: Drove Trace is a distributed error monitoring system designed to handle massive event ingestion without compromising analysis speed. Built with a Clean Architecture approach to ensure strict multi-tenancy and data isolation.

CONTROL_PLANE.TITLE: Control Plane
CONTROL_PLANE.DESC: NestJS services managing secure SdkKeys and project lifecycles with near-zero latency.

DATA_PLANE.TITLE: Data Plane
DATA_PLANE.DESC: High-throughput event ingestion engine with intelligent fingerprinting for noise reduction.

PROJECTS.REACTIVITY_DESC: Zero unnecessary re-renders using Signals for real-time error streams.
PROJECTS.DEVEX_DESC: Consistent local-to-cloud parity ensuring seamless team collaboration.
PROJECTS.AI_EXPLAIN_LOADING: Analyzing business impact of Drove Trace architecture...
PROJECTS.AI_EXPLAIN_CONTENT: Drove Trace provides critical observability by distilling massive error streams into actionable insights using intelligent fingerprinting, ensuring system stability and reducing MTTR by 50%.

TECH_STACK.LABEL: Technical Arsenal
TECH_STACK.DESCRIPTION: An evolving ecosystem of industrial-grade technologies, carefully selected for performance, resilience, and horizontal scalability.

CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Have a mission-critical project or just want to chat about architecture? My inbox is always open.
